overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Marvel's Spider-Man) showing the character Miles Morales walking through an urban environment. The character travels from a park area through a courtyard with red brick buildings, then along a busy city sidewalk, and finally crosses a street at a crosswalk. The scene features autumn foliage, clear sunny weather, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the park along a curved cobblestone path, passing pedestrians and people resting on benches

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunny urban park with cobblestone paths and scattered autumn leaves. Pedestrians stroll along the paths while others sit on benches. Green hedges and trees line the walkways, with a large historic building visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed courtyard with red brick building and green awnings

events.description: passes through black iron gate from park into enclosed courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the iron gate into the courtyard, passing a man in a suit coming from the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: man in gray suit walking toward the camera through the gate

entered.detail: ornate black metal gate marking entrance to courtyard
multi-story red brick building with green dome awnings over doorways
distinctive green dome-shaped awnings over building entrances
open cobblestone courtyard area inside the gate

segments.scene_description: The character passes through an ornate black iron gate into an enclosed courtyard. A red brick building with distinctive green dome awnings dominates the left side. The ground remains cobblestone, and a few pedestrians walk through the space, including a man in a suit approaching from the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city sidewalk with parked cars and storefronts

events.description: exits courtyard through gate onto city sidewalk with concrete pavement and parked cars
passes white delivery truck parked on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk, weaving through pedestrians and passing by parked vehicles and storefronts

trees planted in sidewalk cutouts providing shade

large white box truck with 'MINOTAUR' text on side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a busy city sidewalk lined with parked cars and brownstone buildings. The concrete path is shaded by street trees, and numerous pedestrians walk in both directions. A white delivery truck is parked along the curb, and trash bags sit near a street lamp. The environment transitions from the enclosed courtyard to the open urban street.

events.description: waits at crosswalk then begins crossing the street with other pedestrians
yellow taxi and silver car drive past while crossing

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection
man in plaid shirt crossing alongside the character

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing stripes on asphalt
bright yellow taxi cab with illuminated roof sign
busy street intersection with traffic lights and crossing pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a busy intersection and crosses the street using the marked crosswalk. Yellow taxis and other vehicles drive through the intersection as pedestrians cross together. The white delivery truck remains visible on the right side of the street. The scene opens up to full sky visibility with tall buildings surrounding the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a serene urban park into the bustling activity of a city intersection. It begins on cobblestone paths scattered with autumn leaves, moving past pedestrians and green hedges toward a large historic building in the distance. As the camera passes through an ornate black iron gate, the environment shifts into an enclosed courtyard dominated by a red brick building with green dome awnings. The scene then opens from the courtyard onto a busy concrete sidewalk lined with brownstone buildings, parked cars, and a white delivery truck. Finally, the camera follows the character across a marked crosswalk at a wide intersection, where the view expands to reveal tall buildings and yellow taxis under a clear sky.
